commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Feishu outbound route logic and tests so bare `oc_...` targets become group routes only when the current Feishu group session or resolved directory target already proves group context.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +82. Total +108 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows bare Feishu `oc_...` outbound routes default to direct and the mirror path persists that route metadata; the linked issue also has a real user report of direct sessions being recreated during normal group replies.
